Title: Successful Checkout with Valid Member and Available Stock
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and book ID "9005" has available stock and member "exam.checkout-ready@example.com" has no active or overdue borrowings
Steps: When the librarian opens the main book list and clicks the checkout action for book ID "9005" and enters "exam.checkout-ready@example.com" as the Library Member ID and the borrower name and phone are displayed and the librarian clicks the Submit Checkout button
Expected Result: Then the checkout record is created and the available stock for book ID "9005" is reduced by 1 and a success confirmation is shown

Title: Checkout Button Disabled When Library Member ID Is Empty
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the checkout page for book ID "9005"
Steps: When the librarian leaves the Library Member ID input empty
Expected Result: Then the Submit Checkout button is disabled

Title: Checkout Button Disabled When Library Member ID Has Invalid Email Format
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the checkout page for book ID "9005"
Steps: When the librarian enters "notanemail" in the Library Member ID input
Expected Result: Then the Submit Checkout button is disabled

Title: Checkout Button Disabled When Library Member ID Is Not Found in Registry
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the checkout page for book ID "9005"
Steps: When the librarian enters "nonexistent.member@example.com" in the Library Member ID input and the system looks up the member
Expected Result: Then the borrower name and phone are not displayed and the Submit Checkout button is disabled

Title: Checkout Button Disabled and Message Shown When Book Is Out of Stock
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and book ID "9003" has zero available stock
Steps: When the librarian opens the checkout page for book ID "9003"
Expected Result: Then the message "The selected book is out of stock." is shown and the Submit Checkout button is disabled

Title: Checkout Rejected When Borrower Has Overdue Items
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and member "exam.return-late@example.com" has an overdue item for book ID "9002"
Steps: When the librarian opens the checkout page for book ID "9005" and enters "exam.return-late@example.com" in the Library Member ID input
Expected Result: Then the overdue warning banner is displayed and the checkout is rejected with a message that overdue borrowers cannot borrow more books and no checkout record is created

Title: Checkout Blocked When Borrower Already Has That Book Checked Out
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and member "exam.return-on-time@example.com" has an active checkout for book ID "9001"
Steps: When the librarian opens the checkout page for book ID "9001" and enters "exam.return-on-time@example.com" in the Library Member ID input
Expected Result: Then the message "The borrower already has that book checked out." is shown and the Submit Checkout button is disabled and no new checkout record is created

Title: Due Date Equals Checkout Date Plus 14 Days
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the checkout page for book ID "9005" and has entered a valid Library Member ID
Steps: When the librarian views the checkout date and due date displayed on the page
Expected Result: Then the due date displayed equals the checkout date plus 14 calendar days

Title: Borrower Name and Phone Displayed After Valid Library Member ID Lookup
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the checkout page for book ID "9005"
Steps: When the librarian enters "exam.checkout-ready@example.com" in the Library Member ID input
Expected Result: Then the member name and phone number are displayed in the read-only borrower name and phone fields

Title: Checkout Page Displays Selected Book ID and Title
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the main book list page
Steps: When the librarian clicks the checkout action for book ID "9005"
Expected Result: Then the checkout page displays the correct book ID "9005" and the book title for the selected book

Title: Checkout Date Input Defaults to Current GMT+7 Date and Is Read-Only
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the checkout page for book ID "9005"
Steps: When the librarian views the checkout date input field
Expected Result: Then the checkout date input displays the current local library date in GMT+7 and the field is read-only

Title: Successful On-Time Return
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and book ID "9001" has an active checkout for member "exam.return-on-time@example.com" with borrow date 7 days ago and is not overdue
Steps: When the librarian opens the return page for book ID "9001" and enters "exam.return-on-time@example.com" in the Library Member ID input and clicks the Submit Return button
Expected Result: Then the checkout is marked as returned and the available stock for book ID "9001" is increased by 1 and no overdue fine is displayed and the success message is shown

Title: Overdue Return Accepted with Fine Calculated at Rp10000 Per Late Day
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and book ID "9002" has an active checkout for member "exam.return-late@example.com" with borrow date 21 days ago and is already overdue
Steps: When the librarian opens the return page for book ID "9002" and enters "exam.return-late@example.com" in the Library Member ID input and clicks the Submit Return button
Expected Result: Then the checkout is marked as returned and the available stock for book ID "9002" is increased by 1 and the overdue fine is calculated at Rp10000 per calendar day late and is displayed on the return page

Title: Return Blocked When No Active Checkout Found for Book and Member
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and book ID "9005" has no active checkout for member "exam.checkout-ready@example.com"
Steps: When the librarian opens the return page for book ID "9005" and enters "exam.checkout-ready@example.com" in the Library Member ID input
Expected Result: Then the return validation banner shows that no active checkout was found and the Submit Return button is disabled and the stock does not change

Title: Return Submitted on Due Date Is Treated as On Time
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and there is an active checkout where today in GMT+7 is the due date
Steps: When the librarian submits the return on the due date
Expected Result: Then the system treats the return as on time and no overdue fine is displayed and the checkout is marked as returned and stock is increased by 1

Title: Return Success Message Displays Correct Format
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and book ID "9001" has an active checkout for member "exam.return-on-time@example.com"
Steps: When the librarian completes a successful on-time return for book ID "9001" for member "exam.return-on-time@example.com"
Expected Result: Then the success message shown matches the format: Returned "<book_name>" from Member One.

Title: Return Page Displays Borrower Name and Phone After Valid Member Lookup
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and book ID "9001" has an active checkout for member "exam.return-on-time@example.com"
Steps: When the librarian opens the return page for book ID "9001" and enters "exam.return-on-time@example.com" in the Library Member ID input
Expected Result: Then the borrower name and phone number are displayed and the due date for the active checkout is shown

Title: Return Date Input Defaults to Current GMT+7 Date and Is Read-Only
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the return page for book ID "9001"
Steps: When the librarian views the return date input field
Expected Result: Then the return date input displays the current local library date in GMT+7 and the field is read-only

Title: Return Blocked When Library Member ID Is Empty
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the return page for book ID "9001"
Steps: When the librarian leaves the Library Member ID input empty
Expected Result: Then the Submit Return button is disabled

Title: Book Log Displays Newest Events First by Default
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and book ID "9001" has circulation history
Steps: When the librarian opens the book log for book ID "9001" from the main book list
Expected Result: Then the book log table shows events with the newest event appearing at the top of the list

Title: Book Log Entry Shows Event Type and Borrower Name and Checkout Date and Return Date and Fine
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and a checkout and return has been completed for a book
Steps: When the librarian opens the book log for that book
Expected Result: Then each log entry shows the event type and borrower name and checkout date and return date when relevant and fine amount when relevant

Title: Book Log Shows Empty State for Book With No Circulation History
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and book ID "9004" has no circulation history
Steps: When the librarian clicks the show log action for book ID "9004"
Expected Result: Then the book log empty state element is displayed and no placeholder log entries are shown in the book log table

Title: Book Log Page Does Not Show Filters or Pagination or Export Options
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset
Steps: When the librarian opens the book log page for any book
Expected Result: Then no filter controls and no pagination controls and no export options are visible on the page

Title: Book Log Page Displays Correct Book ID and Title for Selected Book
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the main book list page
Steps: When the librarian clicks the show log action for book ID "9001"
Expected Result: Then the book log page displays the correct book ID "9001" and the corresponding book title

Title: HTML or Script Input in Library Member ID field Is Rejected During Checkout
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the checkout page for book ID "9005"
Steps: When the librarian enters "<script>alert('xss')</script>" in the Library Member ID input and attempts to submit
Expected Result: Then the input is not processed or stored and the system shows a validation error and the checkout is not created

Title: HTML or Script Input in Library Member ID field Is Rejected During Return
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the return page for book ID "9001"
Steps: When the librarian enters "<script>alert('xss')</script>" in the Library Member ID input and attempts to submit
Expected Result: Then the input is not processed or stored and the system shows a validation error and no return is processed

Title: Duplicate Checkout Attempt for Same Book and Member Is Rejected
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and member "exam.return-on-time@example.com" already has an active checkout for book ID "9001"
Steps: When the librarian attempts to check out book ID "9001" again for member "exam.return-on-time@example.com"
Expected Result: Then the checkout is rejected with the message "The borrower already has that book checked out." and no new checkout record is created

Title: Clicking Checkout Action on Main Book List Navigates to Checkout Page
References: Main Page spec; Checkout Page spec
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the main book list page
Steps: When the librarian clicks the checkout action button for book ID "9005"
Expected Result: Then the checkout page is opened and displays the correct book ID "9005" and book title

Title: Clicking Return Action on Main Book List Navigates to Return Page
References: Main Page spec; Return Page spec
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the main book list page
Steps: When the librarian clicks the return action button for book ID "9001"
Expected Result: Then the return page is opened and displays the correct book ID "9001" and book title

Title: Clicking Show Log Action on Main Book List Navigates to Book Log Page
References: Main Page spec; Book Log Page spec
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the main book list page
Steps: When the librarian clicks the show log action button for book ID "9001"
Expected Result: Then the book log page is opened and displays the correct book ID and book title

Title: Main Book List Search Finds Books by Book ID
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the main book list page
Steps: When the librarian enters "9001" in the book search input
Expected Result: Then the book list table shows only books matching the ID "9001"

Title: Main Book List Search Finds Books by Partial Title
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset and the librarian is on the main book list page
Steps: When the librarian enters a partial book title in the book search input
Expected Result: Then the book list table shows only books whose title contains the entered text

Title: Main Book List Shows Correct Available Stock for Each Book
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset
Steps: When the librarian views the main book list
Expected Result: Then the stock cell for each book shows the correct current available stock including "0" for out-of-stock book ID "9003"

Title: Global Alert Banner Shows Validation Messages
Preconditions: Given the test data has been reset
Steps: When a validation error occurs on any page (checkout or return)
Expected Result: Then the global alert banner is visible and shows the relevant validation or error message
